items.caption: A collection of six square icons, each depicting a different weather condition. the top left icon features a smiling sun with a face, symbolizing a sunny day. adjacent to it, the top right icon shows a sun with its eyes closed, possibly indicating a sunny day with a light drizzle. the bottom left icon presents a sun with a frown, suggesting a cloudy day. the bottom right icon depicts a sun with a smile and a snowflake, which could represent a sunny day with snowfall. the middle left icon illustrates a sun with a smile and raindrops, symbolizing a sunny day with rain. lastly, the middle right icon shows a sun with a frown and a lightning bolt, indicating a cloudy day with a thunderstorm. the style of the icons is cartoonish and colorful, with the sun character consistently present in each icon, adding a playful touch to the weather forecast representation.
